items.name: Property Management Portal
items.description: Complete property management platform for real estate investors and property owners. Includes portfolio dashboard, property/unit management, tenant management, financial tracking (P&L, rent roll, expenses), maintenance ticketing, and a self-service tenant portal.

items.name: Terminal Dashboard
items.description: CLI-style terminal dashboard for developer tools. Retro-modern terminal aesthetic with phosphor green/amber, ASCII borders, split panes, and optional CRT effects. Dark mode only.

items.name: Gaming Platform
items.description: Gaming community hub with profiles, leaderboards, and game catalog

items.name: Real-Time Collaboration Workspace
items.description: Complete collaboration platform with live presence, remote cursors, inline comments, and hierarchical pages. Notion/Linear-style productivity workspace with warm, content-focused design.

items.name: Workbench
items.description: Interactive design-system and API workbench. 7-layer navigation with registry-driven content, global search, live theming controls, and viewport simulation.

items.name: Spatial Collaboration
items.description: Immersive collaborative workspace combining spatial depth-layered canvases with real-time presence, auth, and public-facing about pages.

items.name: Content Site
items.description: Blog, magazine, documentation, or knowledge base with articles, categories, and search.

items.name: Creator Monetization Platform
items.description: Complete creator monetization platform with dual-shell architecture. Creator dashboard for content, subscribers, and earnings management. Fan storefront for browsing and purchasing. Patreon/Gumroad-style.

items.name: E-Commerce
items.description: Online retail with product catalog, cart, checkout, and account management.

items.name: Cloud Platform
items.description: Full cloud infrastructure platform with marketing landing, app management, team collaboration, service catalog, deploy logs, usage monitoring, billing, and auth

items.name: Product Landing Page
items.description: Complete product marketing landing page composition. Dark premium aesthetic with vibrant geometric accents, split hero, problem visualization, feature pipeline showcase, and conversion-optimized CTA flow. Derived from the Decantr brand homepage.

items.name: Registry Platform
items.description: Content registry with browsing, publishing, user management, team collaboration, and admin moderation. Dogfooded UI for the Decantr design intelligence platform.

items.name: Portfolio
items.description: Single-page brand landing site with stunning hero, feature showcase, social proof, and conversion-focused layout.

items.name: Financial Dashboard
items.description: Performance dashboard for financial services, lending, and banking. Portfolio overview with goal tracking, production monitoring, pipeline management, collections, and compliance.

items.name: eCommerce Admin
items.description: Admin dashboard for store operations — product catalog management, order processing, customer relationships, inventory tracking, promotions, and sales analytics.

items.name: SaaS Dashboard
items.description: Analytics and admin dashboard with KPIs, data tables, charts, user management, and settings.

items.name: Recipe Community
items.description: AI-powered recipe sharing platform with community feed, photo-to-recipe AI generation, chef chat, cookbook collections, and social cooking features.

items.name: Agent Marketplace
items.description: Full agent marketplace platform for discovering, deploying, and monitoring autonomous agent swarms. Combines orchestration dashboard, auth, marketing landing, and AI transparency views.

items.name: Carbon AI Portal
items.description: Complete AI chatbot platform with auth, marketing, settings, and legal pages. Sleek developer-tool aesthetic with neutral-cool grays and soft muted blue accent.
